Bash(NO_PROXY='*' python3 -c "
import websocket
import json
import struct
import gzip
import os

APP_ID = '3214571057'
TOKEN = 'RSi0XcS9HHmyVMcvhie9-yDo_tIxRWE0'
RESOURCE_ID = 'seed-tts-2.0'
VOICE = 'zh_female_vv_uranus_bigtts'

def on_open\(ws\):
    print\('Connected'\)
    req = {'app': {'appid': APP_ID, 'token': TOKEN, 'cluster': 'volc_tts'},
           'user': {'uid': 'test'},
           'audio': {'voice_type': VOICE, 'encoding': 'pcm', 'rate': 16000, 'bits': 16, 'channel': 1},
           'request': {'reqid': '1', 'text': '你好', 'text_type': 'plain', 'operation': 'query'}}
    data = gzip.compress\(json.dumps\(req\).encode\(\)\)
    msg = bytes\([0x11, 0x11, 0x11, 0x00]\) + struct.pack\('>I', 1\) + struct.pack\('>I', len\(data\)\) + data
    print\(f'Sending {len\(msg\)} bytes'\)
    ws.send\(msg, opcode=0x02\)

def on_msg\(ws, msg\):
    print\(f'Response: {len\(msg\)} bytes, hex: {msg[:20].hex\(\)}'\)

def on_err\(ws, err\):
    print\(f'Error: {err}'\)

ws = websocket.WebSocketApp\('wss://openspeech.bytedance.com/api/v3/tts/bidirection',
    header={'X-Api-App-Key': APP_ID, 'X-Api-Access-Key': TOKEN, 'X-Api-Resource-Id': RESOURCE_ID},
    on_open=on_open, on_message=on_msg, on_error=on_err\)
os.environ['NO_PROXY'] = '*'
ws.run_forever\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(NO_PROXY='*' python3 << 'EOF'
import requests
import json

API_URL = "http://192.168.2.8:18789"
TOKEN = "f894296566d6b5365d2dd6ec9b19ecb70555add6cd73b0c7"

# 测试使用 openclaw/main 作为 model
print\("测试 model = openclaw/main..."\)
headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {TOKEN}",
    "x-openclaw-scopes": "operator.write,operator.read",
    "x-openclaw-session-id": "main"
}

payload = {
    "model": "openclaw/main",
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "你好，请记住我是小红"}],
    "stream": False
}

resp = requests.post\(f"{API_URL}/v1/chat/completions", headers=headers, json=payload, timeout=30\)
print\(f"状态码: {resp.status_code}"\)
if resp.status_code == 200:
    print\(f"响应: {resp.json\(\)['choices'][0]['message']['content'][:200]}"\)

# 第二次请求测试记忆
print\("\\n第二次请求..."\)
payload2 = {
    "model": "openclaw/main",
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "我是谁？"}],
    "stream": False
}

resp2 = requests.post\(f"{API_URL}/v1/chat/completions", headers=headers, json=payload2, timeout=30\)
print\(f"状态码: {resp2.status_code}"\)
if resp2.status_code == 200:
    print\(f"响应: {resp2.json\(\)['choices'][0]['message']['content'][:200]}"\)
EOF)

import requests
import json

API_URL = "http://192.168.2.8:18789"

Bash(NO_PROXY='*' python3 << 'EOF'
import requests
import json

API_URL = "http://192.168.2.8:18789"
TOKEN = "f894296566d6b5365d2dd6ec9b19ecb70555add6cd73b0c7"

# 尝试获取 sessions 列表
headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {TOKEN}",
    "x-openclaw-scopes": "operator.read"
}

# 尝试不同的 session API endpoints
endpoints = [
    "/api/sessions",
    "/v1/sessions", 
    "/api/agents/main/sessions",
]

for ep in endpoints:
    url = f"{API_URL}{ep}"
    print\(f"尝试 GET {url}"\)
    try:
        resp = requests.get\(url, headers=headers, timeout=5\)
        print\(f"  状态码: {resp.status_code}"\)
        if resp.status_code == 200 and resp.headers.get\('content-type', ''\).startswith\('application/json'\):
            print\(f"  响应: {resp.text[:200]}"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"  错误: {e}"\)
EOF)

import requests
import json

API_URL = "http://192.168.2.8:18789"
TOKEN = "f894296566d6b5365d2dd6ec9b19ecb70555add6cd73b0c7"

headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {TOKEN}",
    "x-openclaw-scopes": "operator.read"
}

resp = requests.get\(f"{API_URL}/v1/sessions", headers=headers, timeout=10\)
print\(f"状态码: {resp.status_code}"\)
print\(f"Content-Type: {resp.headers.get\('content-type'\)}"\)

if resp.headers.get\('content-type', ''\).startswith\('application/json'\):
    data = resp.json\(\)
    print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:2000]\)
else:
    print\(resp.text[:500]\)
EOF)

Bash(NO_PROXY='*' python3 << 'EOF'
import websocket
import json
import threading
import time

API_URL = "ws://192.168.2.8:18789"
TOKEN = "f894296566d6b5365d2dd6ec9b19ecb70555add6cd73b0c7"

def on_message\(ws, message\):
    print\(f"收到: {message[:200]}"\)

def on_error\(ws, error\):
    print\(f"错误: {error}"\)

def on_open\(ws\):
    print\("WebSocket 已连接"\)
    # 尝试发送消息
    msg = {
        "type": "chat.send",
        "session": "main",
        "content": "测试 WebSocket 连接"
    }
    ws.send\(json.dumps\(msg\)\)

def on_close\(ws, close_status_code, close_msg\):
    print\(f"关闭: {close_status_code} - {close_msg}"\)

# 尝试连接到 OpenClaw WebSocket
headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {TOKEN}",
}

print\("尝试连接 WebSocket..."\)
try:
    ws = websocket.WebSocketApp\(
        f"{API_URL}/ws",
        header=headers,
        on_open=on_open,
        on_message=on_message,
        on_error=on_error,
        on_close=on_close
    \)
    wst = threading.Thread\(target=ws.run_forever\)
    wst.daemon = True
    wst.start\(\)
    time.sleep\(3\)
    ws.close\(\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"连接失败: {e}"\)
EOF)

Bash(NO_PROXY='*' python3 << 'EOF'
import requests
import json

API_URL = "http://192.168.2.8:18789"
TOKEN = "f894296566d6b5365d2dd6ec9b19ecb70555add6cd73b0c7"

headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {TOKEN}",
    "x-openclaw-scopes": "operator.write,operator.read",
    "x-openclaw-session-id": "kitty-test"
}

# 模拟已有历史消息
messages = [
    {"role": "user", "content": "你好，我是小明"},
    {"role": "assistant", "content": "你好小明！我是 Kitty，很高兴认识你！"},
    {"role": "user", "content": "请记住我喜欢吃苹果"},
    {"role": "assistant", "content": "好的，我记住了！小明喜欢吃苹果 🍎"},
]

print\("=== 测试1：发送历史消息 ==="\)
print\(f"历史消息: {len\(messages\)} 条"\)

# 新请求，带上历史消息
messages.append\({"role": "user", "content": "你还记得我是谁吗？我喜欢吃什么？"}\)

payload = {
    "model": "openclaw/main",
    "messages": messages,
    "stream": False
}

resp = requests.post\(f"{API_URL}/v1/chat/completions", headers=headers, json=payload, timeout=30\)
print\(f"状态码: {resp.status_code}"\)
if resp.status_code == 200:
    reply = resp.json\(\)['choices'][0]['message']['content']
    print\(f"回复: {reply}"\)
    
    # 检查是否记住了历史
    if "小明" in reply or "苹果" in reply:
        print\("\\n✅ 成功！AI 记住了历史上下文"\)
    else:
        print\("\\n❌ 失败！AI 没有记住历史上下文"\)
EOF)

Bash(NO_PROXY='*' python3 << 'EOF'
import websocket
import json
import threading
import time
import hashlib

API_URL = "ws://192.168.2.8:18789"
TOKEN = "f894296566d6b5365d2dd6ec9b19ecb70555add6cd73b0c7"

received = []
connected = False

def on_message\(ws, message\):
    data = json.loads\(message\)
    msg_type = data.get\("type"\)
    event = data.get\("event"\)
    
    print\(f"收到: {json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:300]}"\)
    
    if event == "connect.challenge":
        # 响应 challenge
        nonce = data.get\("payload", {}\).get\("nonce"\)
        print\(f"\\n处理 challenge, nonce: {nonce}"\)
        
        # 计算响应 - 需要查看 OpenClaw 的认证方式
        response = {
            "type": "connect.response",
            "token": TOKEN
        }
        ws.send\(json.dumps\(response\)\)
        print\("已发送认证响应"\)
        
    elif msg_type == "event" and data.get\("event"\) == "session.ready":
        print\("\\n✅ Session 已就绪"\)
        # 发送测试消息
        chat_msg = {
            "type": "chat.send",
            "content": "WebSocket 测试消息"
        }
        ws.send\(json.dumps\(chat_msg\)\)
        print\("已发送聊天消息"\)

def on_error\(ws, error\):
    print\(f"错误: {error}"\)

def on_open\(ws\):
    print\("WebSocket 连接成功"\)

def on_close\(ws, code, msg\):
    print\(f"连接关闭: code={code}, msg={msg}"\)

print\("尝试连接 OpenClaw WebSocket..."\)
ws = websocket.WebSocketApp\(
    f"{API_URL}/ws",
    header={"Authorization": f"Bearer {TOKEN}"},
    on_open=on_open,
    on_message=on_message,
    on_error=on_error,
    on_close=on_close
\)

wst = threading.Thread\(target=ws.run_forever\)
wst.daemon = True
wst.start\(\)

time.sleep\(5\)
ws.close\(\)
print\("\\n测试结束"\)
EOF)
